name: Faro Web SDK Bundle Size Optimization

description: Replace ua-parser-js (25KB) with lightweight parseUserAgent (~1KB). SDK: 92331→73593 (-18738B, -20%)

asi.hypothesis: ua-parser-js is 25KB minified but only getBrowser/getOS/getUA used. Replace with ~50 line regex-based parser.

description: Inline is.ts helpers — increased size by 575B because terser already optimizes shared wrappers

asi.hypothesis: Inline typeof/toString checks in is.ts so terser can optimize them individually
asi.rollback_reason: Shared wrapper functions (isTypeof, isToString) are actually more efficient for minification because the string literals are not duplicated
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on other areas: genShortID, spread operators, deepEqual, or reducing code surface area

description: Optimize genShortID (for loop), getTransportBody (mutation vs spread), groupItems (push vs spread), mergeResourceSpans (concat vs spread). -214B

asi.hypothesis: Replace spread operators with mutations and Array.from with for loops in core utilities

description: Optimize deepEqual (inline typeof/Array.isArray, merge key loops) and exception init (direct assignment vs conditional spreads). -64B

asi.hypothesis: Inline isArray/isObject/isTypeof in deepEqual to avoid function call overhead and let terser optimize directly. Replace conditional spread in exception init with if-statements.

description: Optimize FetchTransport: replace conditional spreads with direct assignment for headers and requestOptions. -27B

asi.hypothesis: Conditional spread patterns like ...(x ? {k:v} : {}) in FetchTransport can be replaced with direct if-then assignments

description: Terser config: passes:2, pure_getters, unsafe_methods. Saves -841B across all bundles (core -204, sdk -212, tracing -564)

asi.hypothesis: Better terser options (passes:2, pure_getters, unsafe_methods) allow more aggressive minification

description: Terser: add passes:3, ecma:2020, unsafe_comps, unsafe_math. Saves another -386B total

asi.hypothesis: Even more aggressive terser: ecma:2020, unsafe_comps, unsafe_math, passes:3

description: Terser: enable toplevel for both compress and mangle. -92B

asi.hypothesis: toplevel:true in terser compress+mangle allows dead code elimination and shorter names at top level

description: Deduplicate PersistentSessionsManager/VolatileSessionsManager via shared createSessionManagerClass factory. SDK: -703B

asi.hypothesis: PersistentSessionsManager and VolatileSessionsManager are nearly identical except for storage type. Extract shared factory.

description: Use ES2020 target for bundle compilation. Native class fields, optional chaining etc. save -7804B total (core -1328, sdk -5331, tracing -1145)

asi.hypothesis: TypeScript ES6 target generates verbose helper code for class fields, async/await, etc. ES2020 uses native browser features instead.

description: ES2022 target is +65B worse than ES2020. Private class fields (#) generate more code in IIFE context.

asi.hypothesis: ES2022 target uses native private fields (#) which generate larger IIFE code than ES2020's WeakMap-free approach
asi.next_action_hint: Stay with ES2020 target. Look for more code-level optimizations.

description: Replace string enums (LogLevel, TransportItemType, InternalLoggerLevel) with const objects + type aliases. -1504B total (core -725, sdk -779)

asi.hypothesis: TS enums generate IIFE wrappers like (function(E){...})(E||{}) which are larger than plain const objects. Const objects with as const are directly inlined.
asi.note: Numeric enum UserActionState kept as enum due to test type compatibility

description: Switch OTel otlp-transformer imports to ESM paths for better tree-shaking. Inline ESpanKind constant. Tracing: 82603→77132 (-5471B, -6.6%)

asi.hypothesis: CJS imports from @opentelemetry/otlp-transformer/build/src/ prevent tree-shaking. ESM paths at build/esm/ allow rollup to eliminate unused exports. Also inlined ESpanKind.SPAN_KIND_CLIENT=3 to avoid pulling in the enum IIFE.

description: rollup generatedCode:es2015 — +183B because IIFE wrapper is slightly larger with arrow functions

asi.hypothesis: rollup generatedCode es2015 uses arrow functions in wrapper code
asi.rollback_reason: +183B because IIFE wrapper is slightly longer
asi.next_action_hint: Look for more source-level optimizations or try other rollup output options

description: Simplify Observable: merge first/takeWhile/filter to shared _pipe(), use for-of in notify, simplify merge(). Core: -227B, SDK: -227B

asi.hypothesis: Observable had verbose withUnsubscribeOverride pattern and unsubscribeAll method. Consolidating to _pipe() and simplifying merge() reduces code.
